response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled software craftsman and individual contributor with robust distributed systems experience, but he completely lacks the executive leadership background required for this CTO role. There is no evidence of him scaling engineering organizations, developing leadership layers, or operating complex, high-stakes multi-agent AI systems in a regulated fintech environment.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems experience, including high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Strong foundation in software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD methodologies.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Zero executive-level leadership experience or track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Lacks production experience deploying and operating stateful multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes commercial environments.
Missing required domain expertise in algorithmic working-capital allocation, real-time credit risk, and margin optimization.
